item.title: This is not journalism btw, this is actually just a really good argument for me not being given Internet access
item.description:
This is not journalism btw, this is actually just a really good argument for me not being given Internet access. (Sniffies is a location based gay hookup app, think gridnr but less chatting and more just showing up)

item.title: They recruit by convincing you that no one will dislike you when you come back or the few people that do will be replaced by you...
item.description:
They recruit by convincing you that no one will dislike you when you come back or the few people that do will be replaced by your lovely pals and arms. And recon control whether that is true.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: they are demonstrating how separated they are from the actual place
item.description:
they are demonstrating how separated they are from the actual place. They actually live in the actual culture they live around because they don’t live around it.
They live in a constructed city, on the back of slaves that they brag about#greenscreenvideo

item.title: GE Aerospace is directly responsible for the end of thousands of Palestinians lives
item.description:
GE Aerospace is directly responsible for the end of thousands of Palestinians lives. They have no place on earth, much less on campus. But the center of empire rly does have a way of making them comfy.
